verdict_reason: New gateway compose block correctly mirrors the established backend-tier pattern (unique port, valid healthcheck, legitimate localstack deps, no secrets, no hard-coded TST values); only a Minor ASB env pass-through gap

todos.issue: Gateway service environment block has no AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_CONNECTION_STRING / AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_QUEUE pass-through, so the container is locked to the dummy local-profile defaults and the stack cannot be pointed at the real TST namespace for the ticket's manual connectivity testing without editing the file
todos.fix: Add value-less pass-through entries '- AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_CONNECTION_STRING' and '- AZURE_SERVICE_BUS_QUEUE' to the environment list; when unset on the host they are omitted and the local-profile defaults still apply
